# Ægentes

> Ægentes builds websites and AI receptionists for shops, trades and independents — a shopfront that looks like your trade, and a voice that answers the phone when you can't.

Ægentes (from the Latin *agentes*, "the ones who do") is a small studio serving small businesses — bakeries, plumbers, florists, barbers, bookkeepers, and similar independents and trades. It offers two services:

1. **Websites** — custom, handmade websites drawn from the business itself. Typical projects take a few days for a standard site, a week or two for builds with online ordering, bookings, or subscriptions.
2. **AI receptionist** — an AI voice agent that answers the business's phone day or night, on the first ring: it handles common questions, books appointments, and texts the owner the details, speaking in the shop's own voice rather than a call centre's.

Either service can be bought on its own or together. Pricing is one fixed number quoted after an initial conversation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.aegentes.com/): overview of services (websites and AI receptionist) and studio positioning
- [Work](https://www.aegentes.com/work/): portfolio of past projects
- [Studio](https://www.aegentes.com/studio/): about the studio, how it works, house rules
- [Contact](https://www.aegentes.com/contact/): how to start a project, pricing and timeline FAQ

## Contact
